cleavage agent: Samples were reduced, alkylated, and digested with trypsin
fractionation method: fractionated by high-pH reversed phase chromatography
fragmentation method: using CID fragmentation of the 5 most abundant ions
instrument: analyzed by LC-MS/MS on an LTQ-Orbitrap™ mass spectrometer
labeling: label-free analysis of protein extracts by LC-MS/MS
